text: Differential beam - attacks entities with a beam attack.
Overheating - ignites an entity near you.
Thermal blast - explodes the entity next to you.
Climate Control: +20% damage; 10% chance to ignite target for 3 sec.
Insulation: When ignited, 75% chance to gain "Fire Resistance" for 1 min and "Regeneration II" for 5 sec (once per 90 sec).
